'''Derris''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] group that consisted of two shuttles owned by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. These shuttles escaped from the [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']] just prior to its destruction at the hands of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The shuttles were carrying the command cadre from the cruiser, but were intercepted and disabled by Imperial [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and subsequently captured by the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Stormtrooper Transport]] [[Zack 1]].

{{Ship-stub}}
